Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2:

Hi Isaac and Liang,

Could you please review this patch? Thank you.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

I tried this on our Mellanox 2.4 stack using the mlx5 driver which doesn't support FMR. Removing PMR makes the mlx5 driver totally useless with ko2iblnd.

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

James, so I assume you enabled map_on_demand right?

Patch Set 2:

Yes disabling map_on_demand made the mlx5 workable. Now I'm back to 

[  765.953638] LNetError: 1682:0:(o2iblnd.c:920:kiblnd_create_conn()) Can't create QP: -12, send_wr: 16191, recv_wr: 128

I was using map_on_demand with the patch from LU-3322 to make my mlx5 <-> mlx4 connection work. Now that is gone :-(

commit.subject: LU-6850 lnet: remove references to ib_reg_phys_mr()
commit.message:
LU-6850 lnet: remove references to ib_reg_phys_mr()

Removed references to ib_reg_phys_mr() and PMR which were added
to deal with some Chelsio specific scenario, but are no longer needed.

Signed-off-by: Amir Shehata <amir.shehata@intel.com>
Change-Id: I07fc8e66e5bb0ade286761612b9b878fae34c183
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/15788
Tested-by: Jenkins
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Frank Zago <fzago@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
